Text.Page:
Here, take these kits. Craft some metalworker's greatswords and bring them to me when you've finished.

If they pass inspection, we can put them to good use.

Nice, very nice. These are fine work, .

I'd say they are ready for the field. Deliver the greatswords to Jodoc in Crescentia. His slayers have been itching for new weapons.
You've got the design and kits. Talk to the crafting vendors if you need additional materials.
Fine blades you've brought us. Excellent work. I thank you and my slayers thank you.
